instruction:
Complete a verifiable lake landscape photo enhancement workflow using the image at /home/user/Desktop/nicolagiordano-the-needle-3400239_1920.jpg. Each step produces measurable, verifiable outputs:

1. Create a new layer named exactly 'Sky_Blue' above the background. Use the Free Select tool to select the sky area (top 45% of the image). Apply Hue-Saturation adjustment: increase Blue saturation by exactly +35 to make the sky more vibrant.

2. Create a new layer named exactly 'Water_Reflection' above 'Sky_Blue'. Use the Hue-Saturation adjustment on the water area (middle 35% of the image): increase saturation by exactly +25 to enhance the cloud reflections.

3. Create a new layer named exactly 'Forest_Contrast' above 'Water_Reflection'. Use the Curves adjustment on the forest/tree line area: create an S-curve to increase contrast by 18%, making the tree line more defined.

4. Create a new layer named exactly 'Grass_Vibrant' above 'Forest_Contrast'. Use the Color Balance adjustment on the foreground grass area: add +20 to Green channel and +10 to Yellow channel to make the grass more vibrant.

5. Create a new layer named exactly 'Vignette' at the top of the layer stack. Use the Elliptical Select tool to create an oval covering 75% of the image from center, apply Select > Feather with 90px radius, invert selection, and fill with black at 22% opacity.

6. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Title' at the top-center with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'SERENE LAKE'
   - Font size: 38px
   - Color: #ffffff (white)
   - Position: centered horizontally, 30px from top edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Title'

7. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Location' at the bottom-right corner with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'THE NEEDLE'
   - Font size: 22px
   - Color: #87ceeb (sky blue)
   - Position: 25px from right edge, 25px from bottom edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Location'

8. Create a new layer named exactly 'Frame' at the very top. Use Select > All, then Edit > Stroke Selection with a 10px solid color #2e8b57 (sea green) to create a border around the entire image.

9. Export the final image as 'lake_masterpiece.jpg' with exact specifications: JPEG format, width 1600 pixels (height auto), quality 94. Save the project as 'lake_project.xcf' with all layers preserved.
